closed_reason: Replaced the tiny-state sync proptests with deterministic matrix coverage so sync invariants stay covered without the old test variance.

notes.author: darin@book
notes.content:
Replaced the tiny-state sync proptests in `crates/beads-git/src/sync.rs` with deterministic matrix/scenario coverage. The new cases explicitly cover local-only, remote-only, same-head, local-ahead, remote-ahead, diverged, repeat-fetch stability, non-fast-forward push recovery, and force-push backup behavior.

This keeps the historical/fetch invariants under test while removing an expensive, low-signal source of variance from the suite.

Verification on current stack:
- `cargo fmt --all`
- `just dylint`
- `cargo clippy --all-features -- -D warnings`
- `cargo xtest --no-fail-fast --status-level none --final-status-level slow`
- `cargo nextest run --profile slow --workspace --all-features --features slow-tests --no-fail-fast --status-level none --final-status-level slow`

title: Replace tiny-state beads-git sync proptests with deterministic matrix coverage
